POS OF OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PICKENS, JANET

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, IS A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY AND NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY CCP 391.1 AND TO ENTER PRE-FILING ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 391.7 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CAL CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1) AND CAL CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(3). PLAINTIFF IS HEREBY ORDER TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH CLERK OF THIS COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 19, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT FURTHER GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION PURSUANT TO CA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 FOR ENTRY OF A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN THE COURTS OF THIS STATE WITHOUT OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE OF THE COURT WHERE SUCH NEW LITIGATION IS PROPOSED TO BE FILED. THE COURT DIRECTS THE CLERK OF THIS COURT TO RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT BY THIS COURT AND PROHIBITED FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN THE COURTS OF THIS STATE IN PROPRIA PERSONA WITHOUT OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE OF THE COURT WHERE THE LITIGATION IS PROPOSED TO BE FILED ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S PUBLISHED VEXATIOUS LITIGANT LIST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- JANET PICKENS, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. ANDREW M. GSCHWIND, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3973 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. RULING - A R G U E D; JUDGE BUSCH DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, IS A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY AND NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security C C P 391.1 And To Enter Pre-Filing Order Pursuant To C C P 391.7 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CAL CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1) AND CAL CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(3). PLAINTIFF IS HEREBY ORDER TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH CLERK OF THIS COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 19, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT FURTHER GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION PURSUANT TO CA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 FOR ENTRY OF A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN THE COURTS OF THIS STATE WITHOUT OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE OF THE COURT WHERE SUCH NEW LITIGATION IS PROPOSED TO BE FILED. THE COURT DIRECTS THE CLERK OF THIS COURT TO RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT BY THIS COURT AND PROHIBITED FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN THE COURTS OF THIS STATE IN PROPRIA PERSONA WITHOUT OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE OF THE COURT WHERE THE LITIGATION IS PROPOSED TO BE FILED ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S PUBLISHED VEXATIOUS LITIGANT LIST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/LB
